message:
🐛 Fix active-users HTML parse errors on Netlify deploy previews (#4325)

On Netlify (no Go backend), /api/active-users falls through to the SPA
catch-all redirect returning index.html. MSW should intercept these, but
there's a timing gap during MSW startup where fetches fire before the
service worker registers.

The fetch code then tries to parse HTML as JSON, causing repeated
`SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'` console errors every minute.

Fix: Check response content-type before attempting JSON parse. If the
response is not application/json (e.g., text/html from the SPA
fallback), treat it as an error without attempting to parse.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
